name: expert-skills
description: Agent skills that upskill AI agents with the specialized operational knowledge of credentialed practitioners. Unofficial — not affiliated with or endorsed by any vendor; not test-prep. See POLICY.md.

plugins.name: salesforce-skills
plugins.description: Unofficial — not affiliated with or endorsed by Salesforce. 13 operational skills covering Salesforce practitioner domains — Administrator, Advanced Administrator, Platform Developer I/II, JavaScript Developer I (LWC), Technical Architect, the Sales/Service/Experience/Nonprofit consultants, Marketing Cloud Email, Business Analyst, and Agentforce — each with rules, decision tables, scars, and portable verify steps.

plugins.name: aws-skills
plugins.description: Unofficial — not affiliated with or endorsed by Amazon Web Services. 3 operational AWS skills — Solutions Architect – Professional (SAP-C02), DevOps Engineer – Professional (DOP-C02), and Security – Specialty (SCS-C03) — each ~4k words of rules, decision tables, and aws-CLI verify steps.

plugins.name: github-skills
plugins.description: Unofficial — not affiliated with or endorsed by GitHub. GitHub Actions operational skill — CI/CD workflows, reusable/composite workflows, custom actions, runners, OIDC, and supply-chain hardening — with gh-CLI/workflow-lint verify steps.

plugins.name: web-skills
plugins.description: 5 operational web/runtime skills — nodejs (mapped to OpenJS JSNAD/JSNSD), typescript, react, nextjs, react-native — each with rules, decision tables, red flags, and tsc/node/test verify steps. The latter four are competence skills (no vendor cert). Independent content; project/vendor marks used for identification only.
